description_long: This is a heavily armored tracked combat vehicle, featuring a large, centrally mounted turret with a long barrel main cannon. The exterior is covered in angular, sloped armor plating, with additional modular panels and storage compartments along the sides. The vehicle is equipped with visible external equipment such as spare track links, cylindrical fuel tanks, and a mounted machine gun on the turret roof. The tracks are wide and robust, designed for traversing rough terrain, and the suspension system is partially visible beneath the side skirts. A crew member figure is positioned in the open hatch atop the turret, emphasizing the vehicle's operational scale. The surface is painted in a muted, multi-tone camouflage pattern with weathering effects, and no visible military insignia or numbers are present.
description: A large, armored tracked combat vehicle with a turret-mounted cannon, sloped armor, and a multi-tone camouflage finish. Features include external equipment, a visible crew member, and robust tracks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped frontal armor, main cannon, and crew member in the turret hatch.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length of the cannon, side armor panels, tracks, and external equipment.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor, cylindrical fuel tanks, and rear storage compartments.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the turret profile, tracks, and additional side-mounted equipment.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large main cannon mounted on the turret, one machine gun mount on the turret roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped steel armor plating; additional modular panels and reinforced sections visible on the front and sides.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Multi-tone camouflage with olive green, dark gray, and brown in irregular, blended shapes.
